message:
fix(fr-command): ZRANGE BYLEX/LIMIT/WITHSCORES wording matches upstream [bd-frankenredis-06pl]

Three wording divergences vs vendored redis 7.2.4
t_zset.c::zrangeGenericCommand:

- ZRANGE k a b LIMIT 0 5 (no shape): plain 'syntax error' →
  'syntax error, LIMIT is only supported in combination with
  either BYSCORE or BYLEX'.
- ZRANGE k a b WITHSCORES BYLEX: empty result → 'syntax error,
  WITHSCORES not supported in combination with BYLEX'.
- ZRANGE k a b BYLEX with non-[/(/-/+ bounds: silently coerced →
  validate_lex_bound now fires before any range walk, returning
  'min or max not valid string range item' (matches upstream
  zslParseLexRange).

ZRANGEBYLEX/ZREVRANGEBYLEX/ZLEXCOUNT and ZRANGESTORE BYLEX already
validate via the same helper. Differential probe vs vendored
redis 7.2.4 byte-matches all three cases.
